references.text: Steenis, CGGJ van. 1955. Betulaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 5: 207-208

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 15 June 2024

species.citation: (Thunb.) Steud. , Nomencl. Bot. (Steudel), 2nd Ed. 1 (1840) 55; ≡ Betula japonica Thunb. , Nova Acta Regiae Soc. Sci. Upsal., 2nd Ser. 6 (1799) 45. ≠ Alnus maritima auct. non (Marshall) Muhl. ex Nutt. ; Steen., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 5 (1955) 207.
species.distribution: China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan. LUZON: Nueva Vizcaya (photos).
species.notes: Cultivated in Europe and elsewhere. Extensively cultivated in the Cordillera highlands in open and eroded sites. Naturalized in Nueva Vizcaya. 1000-2400m.
